app.name: asocial
app.tagline: Gentle training wheels for keeping your friendships alive

errors.invalid: Please check the form and try again.
errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.duplicateName: That name is already in use.

auth.bootstrapHint: You are the first user — this account will be the administrator.
auth.inviteNeededHint: Registration requires an invite link from an administrator.
auth.noAccountYet: First time here? Create the admin account
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Log in
auth.resetDone: Password updated — log in with your new password.

errors.invalid: Please check the form and try again.
errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.inviteInvalid: This invite link is invalid, used or expired.
errors.resetInvalid: This reset link is invalid, used or expired.

invites.title: Invites
invites.copyHint: Copy this link now — it is shown only once:
invites.resetLinkHint: Share this link with them now — it is shown only once:

circles.title: Circles
circles.intro: Circles group your friends and set their default contact rhythm. A friend in several circles follows the most frequent one.
circles.name: Name
circles.members: {n, plural, =0 {no friends} one {# friend} other {# friends}}
circles.empty: No circles yet. Create one to give your friends a rhythm.
circles.deleteConfirm: Delete this circle? Friends in it are kept; they fall back to other circles or your default interval.
circles.typePrefsHint: Weights for suggestions in this circle. Empty = inherited, 0 = never suggest.

friends.title: Friends
friends.empty: No friends yet. Add the people you want to stay close to.
friends.name: Name
friends.notesHint: Anything worth remembering — partner, kids, topics to avoid…
friends.noCircles: No circles yet — create some first for automatic rhythms.
friends.intervalOverrideHint: Overrides circle rhythms for this friend. Leave empty to follow their circles.
friends.archiveConfirm: Archive this friend? Pending suggestions are cancelled. The journal is kept and you can restore them anytime.
friends.typePrefsHint: How suggestions are weighted for this friend. Empty = inherited, 0 = never suggest.

settings.title: Settings
settings.typesIntro: How asocial may suggest you reach out. Set a weight to 0 to never get that suggestion; higher weights come up more often.

errors.invalid: Please check the form and try again.
errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.intro: Your action windows — colored bands show when to reach out to whom. Click a band to act on it.
dashboard.empty: Nothing scheduled yet. Add friends and circles, and asocial will suggest when to reach out.

digest.title: {n, plural, one {# friend} other {# friends}} to reach out to

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.intro: A short daily digest at your chosen hour — only when something is actually open, and lingering suggestions only every third day.

errors.invalid: Please check the form and try again.
errors.pushoverConfigMissing: Pushover needs both API token and user key.

backup.title: Backup & restore
backup.intro: Download all your circles, friends and journal as a JSON file, or restore from one.
backup.replaceWarning: Restoring replaces ALL your current circles, friends and journal with the file's contents. Pending suggestions will be regenerated. Continue?
backup.imported: Restored {friends} friends, {circles} circles and {interactions} journal entries.

errors.invalidFile: That doesn't look like a valid asocial backup file.
errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
